programme.title: FIA World Endurance Championship
programme.desc: A look ahead to the 2026 Road to Le Mans, the iconic race at the Circuit de la Sarthe in France.

programme.title: Live FIA World Endurance Championship
programme.desc: Coverage from the 24 Hours of Le Mans, as the third round of the season takes place at Circuit de la Sarthe in Le Mans, France. This prestigious race, first held in 1923, is the oldest endurance event in the world, and is one of three races in the 'triple crown' alongside the Formula 1 Monaco Grand Prix and the Indycar Indianapolis 500. Legendary British driver Graham Hill is the only driver to co

programme.desc: The fifth FIA F2 Sprint Race of the season gets underway in Barcelona.

programme.desc: The starting grid for Sunday's Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix is set with Formula 1 qualifying as the drivers look to battle their way through to Q3 for a shot at pole position.

programme.title: Live ICC Women's T20 WC: AUS v SA
programme.desc: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup's most successful team Australia, six-time winners of the competition, open their 2026 bid against South Africa at Old Trafford.

programme.desc: New Zealand's ICC Women's T20 World Cup defence gets underway with a clash against the 2016 champions West Indies at the Hampshire Bowl in Southampton.

programme.desc: The third day of the PGA Tour's RBC Canadian Open, taking place at TPC Toronto. Ryan Fox secured his second tour victory in a playoff with Sam Burns last year.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: Live Curtis Cup
programme.desc: The 2026 edition of the Curtis Cup, pitting Britain and Ireland's best female amateur golfers against the United States', continues with more fourballs play at Bel Air Country Club in LA.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: Milwaukee Brewers v Philadelphia Phillies (Start-time 12.15am). Coverage of the National League match from American Family Field. These sides last met in a three-match series at this venue in September last year as the visitors won the series 2-1. The Phillies won a tight first game 10-8 before the hosts fought back with a 6-3 victory. Philadelphia then shut out the Brewers to take the final match

programme.desc: Live horse racing from around the country.

programme.desc: From New York City.

programme.title: Fight Sports: World Championship Kickboxing
programme.desc: Competitions in kickboxing and Muay Thai.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: The Short List
programme.desc: The sports countdown, featuring iconic themes focused upon the memorable moments and individuals in sports; the 10 memorable debuts, the 10 revered innovators, the comebacks of all time and much more.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Stories behind celebrated events, institutions, clubs, players, rivalries and moments in sport.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Alexa blasts sand across the U.S., riding with the pros in Glamis, then hitting the beach in Coos Bay, and getting a snowy surprise in Sand Hollow; the dunes are a lifestyle.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: King Redford, a former professional boxer and passionate outdoorsman, reflects on his journey beyond the ring and how it led him to find renewed purpose and peace in nature. Through powerful, life-changing experiences, he discovered the true value of the outdoors and its profound impact on his life.

programme.title: Major League Fishing
programme.desc: Four teams compete in knockout match 2 to advance to the championship. From Shreveport-Bossier City, La.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: Golfing the World
programme.desc: Highlighting golf courses and private resorts from around the world.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Altitude Extra
programme.desc: Vic Lombardi sits down with Coach Prime to discuss his recent diagnosis with bladder cancer, how his other health struggles led to that diagnosis and how his faith helps him manage his day-to-day responsibilities.

programme.title: Altitude Extra
programme.desc: Vic Lombardi sat down with Denver Nuggets legend Dan Issel to discuss his basketball career, his involvement with horse racing and his evaluation of Nikola Jokić.

programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.desc: Alexa blasts sand across the U.S., riding with the pros in Glamis, then hitting the beach in Coos Bay, and getting a snowy surprise in Sand Hollow; the dunes are a lifestyle.

programme.desc: Four teams compete in knockout match 2 to advance to the championship. From Shreveport-Bossier City, La.

programme.desc: Coverage of professional tennis matches.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and his friend Remi Warren stalk Roosevelt elk on Afognak Island in the Gulf of Alaska, but inclement weather proves a significant obstacle.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: Savage Outdoors
programme.desc: Mike and uncle Randy are taking advantage of a few free days from guiding to hunt whitetails at home in Texas.

programme.title: Tecomate Whitetail Nation
programme.desc: Mark goes after his biggest buck ever on Tecomate's Highveld Ranch and uses that opportunity to write his name in the Books.

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: Brandon Jennings closes out his season on a successful Missouri muzzleloader hunt.

programme.title: Haymaker Hunting
programme.desc: In West Virginia, King, Brad Shingler, and Justin Rose face off against the wilderness, landing King's first powerful black bear in a heavyweight showdown.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Alexa blasts sand across the U.S., riding with the pros in Glamis, then hitting the beach in Coos Bay, and getting a snowy surprise in Sand Hollow; the dunes are a lifestyle.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy is back on his home turf selling fish from his new shop, Tunavilla Market and Grocery; Tommy learns about what could be the future of seafood.

programme.title: Savage Outdoors
programme.desc: Mike and uncle Randy are taking advantage of a few free days from guiding to hunt whitetails at home in Texas.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and his friend Remi Warren stalk Roosevelt elk on Afognak Island in the Gulf of Alaska, but inclement weather proves a significant obstacle.

programme.title: Tecomate Whitetail Nation
programme.desc: Mark goes after his biggest buck ever on Tecomate's Highveld Ranch and uses that opportunity to write his name in the Books.

programme.title: Haymaker Hunting
programme.desc: In West Virginia, King, Brad Shingler, and Justin Rose face off against the wilderness, landing King's first powerful black bear in a heavyweight showdown.

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Alexa blasts sand across the U.S., riding with the pros in Glamis, then hitting the beach in Coos Bay, and getting a snowy surprise in Sand Hollow; the dunes are a lifestyle.

programme.title: This Is Africa
programme.desc: Andy Buchanan and his team embark on adrenaline-fueled hunting adventures across Africa, showcasing the continent's most sought-after trophies while delving into the crucial role of hunters in wildlife conservation. Amidst epic hunts and breathtaking scenery, they address misconceptions about hunting and highlight the collaborative efforts of local communities, governments, and hunters to protect

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Roger gives a tour of his incredible trophy room to friends.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: The Drury Outdoors Team hunts game and offers tips.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Fred and Ruste explore the importance and connection of private and public land habitat creation and protection; exploring Ruste's story in how he found the island.

programme.title: Chasing the 29
programme.desc: Follow Chase on a coastal brown bear hunt with multiple twists and turns.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action-packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straightforward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching platf

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: The mahi bite is red-hot off Mayport, Florida. Grayson, Carter and Charlie join Capt Don in the Blue water for a day of Mahi madness.

programme.title: Angling Edge
programme.desc: James and Al Lindner break down a lake they have never fished, showing a repeatable process for locating walleyes anywhere.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy is catching crappie in Bass in Alabama.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Fred and Ruste explore the importance and connection of private and public land habitat creation and protection; exploring Ruste's story in how he found the island.

programme.title: Savage Outdoors
programme.desc: Mike and uncle Randy are taking advantage of a few free days from guiding to hunt whitetails at home in Texas.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Hunting is not a privilege, it is our God given right. Hunt always was, and continues to be integrally woven into the fabric of society. It is our goal to celebrate our God given right to hunt in each episode, and portray the passion we all have for this way of life. Follow Kenneth Lancaster, Mark Heck and Laden Force as they travel the country, exercising their God given right to hunt.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Alexa blasts sand across the U.S., riding with the pros in Glamis, then hitting the beach in Coos Bay, and getting a snowy surprise in Sand Hollow; the dunes are a lifestyle.

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: Michael and Beth Lee enjoy their annual trip with the McFerrins from Legends of the Fall hunting big Texas bucks.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Fred and Ruste explore the importance and connection of private and public land habitat creation and protection; exploring Ruste's story in how he found the island.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: The HW crew rings in the new year in West Texas chasing Sandhill cranes with V Land & Holding; the birds roll, delivering limits and memories-especially for Eric Champlin's son; the trip ends with a wild blue quail flush in true Texas tradition.

programme.title: Angling Edge
programme.desc: James and Al Lindner break down a lake they have never fished, showing a repeatable process for locating walleyes anywhere.

programme.title: Big Water Angler
programme.desc: Taking viewers on an adventurous journey across the Great Lakes region and beyond, exploring the best fishing destinations, techniques and insider tips from seasoned captains and guides.

programme.title: Bob Redfern's Outdoor Magazine
programme.desc: Outdoor sporting and recreational events for everyone.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Bill's tempting tributary tarpon in the Indian River Lagoon!

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: The gang will be joined by Chad Poteat and his family today. Chad was diagnosed with ALS over a year ago, and he's always dreamed of being able to fish in the Florida Keys, and now that dream is becoming a reality.

programme.title: Fly Fisherman Presents the Shoals
programme.desc: Join the Fly Fisherman crew on a wild exploration chasing sharks and giant trevally on foot in the beautiful paradise of St. Brandon Atoll.

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures: Fishing with Wesley
programme.desc: Wesley White travels to Brazil to fish for peacock bass on the Rio Negro River.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: JJ Eubanks walks us through his journey as a professional basketball player and how he's become the real MVP.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy is catching crappie in Bass in Alabama.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy is back on his home turf selling fish from his new shop, Tunavilla Market and Grocery; Tommy learns about what could be the future of seafood.

programme.title: Whitetail Properties
programme.desc: The Hicks head to Oklahoma for a charity hunt; rewarded and rewarding the next generation.

programme.title: Whitetail Properties
programme.desc: Whitetail Properties takes you on exciting hunts across the whitetail's range while providing land management tips and representing buyers and sellers of hunting, farm, ranch, timber, country homes and auctions across the country.

programme.title: Whitetail Properties
programme.desc: Missouri rifle season is a grind but persistence and patience pays off.

programme.title: Whitetail Properties
programme.desc: Perusing the American dream under the Alabama pines.

programme.title: Whitetail Properties
programme.desc: Whitetail Properties takes you on exciting hunts across the whitetail's range while providing land management tips and representing buyers and sellers of hunting, farm, ranch, timber, country homes and auctions across the country.

programme.title: Whitetail Properties
programme.desc: Taking viewers on hunts across the whitetail's range while providing land management tips and representing buyers and sellers of hunting, farm, ranch, timber, country homes and auctions across the country.

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: Brandon Jennings closes out his season on a successful Missouri muzzleloader hunt.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Hunting opportunities in Paraguay, and an Asian Water Buffalo hunt.

programme.title: This Is Africa
programme.desc: Andy Buchanan and his team embark on adrenaline-fueled hunting adventures across Africa, showcasing the continent's most sought-after trophies while delving into the crucial role of hunters in wildlife conservation. Amidst epic hunts and breathtaking scenery, they address misconceptions about hunting and highlight the collaborative efforts of local communities, governments, and hunters to protect

programme.title: Live: The FAN Pregame
programme.desc: Ailish Forfar and Justin Cuthbert discuss the stories that matter most to sports fans.

programme.title: Live: Blue Jays Central
programme.desc: Toronto Blue Jays pregame show hosted by Jamie Campbell.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The New York Yankees and the Toronto Blue Jays go head-to-head at a three-game series opener at Rogers Centre in Toronto. New York's left-handed pitcher Ryan Weathers is the projected starter against Toronto's right-handed pitcher Trey Yesavage.

programme.desc: Canada's premier destination for sports and analysis.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Mark Melnyk and Tom Rosenbauer are in Southern Chile fishing New Waters to them and the guides.

programme.title: Connect Fishing Experiences
programme.desc: Josh targets winter springs at Harwood Island with his friend Sam Sansalone, owner of Powell River Outdoors.

programme.title: Extreme Angler TV
programme.desc: It's 5-star treatment time from Northwest Ontario fishing remote lakes in summer for smallmouth bass from Hawk Lake Lodge.

programme.title: The Fish'n Canada Show
programme.desc: This unique episode shows the ultimate north-country accommodations, combined with non-stop, drive-to fishing.

programme.title: Westcoast Sporting Journal
programme.desc: A father and son trip to Winter Harbour on Vancouver Island for Big King Salmon.

programme.title: BC Outdoors Sportfishing
programme.desc: Host Mike Mitchell and guests fish throughout British Columbia.

programme.title: Fishing the Wild West
programme.desc: The subtle bite of big walleye on Lac La Biche.

programme.title: Lisa Roper Outdoors
programme.desc: Lisa ventures to the breathtaking Wolf Lake in the Yukon, where the thrill of reeling in lake trout against a stunning wilderness backdrop makes for an unforgettable experience.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Mark Melnyk and Tom Rosenbauer are in Southern Chile fishing New Waters to them and the guides.

programme.title: Connect Fishing Experiences
programme.desc: Josh targets winter springs at Harwood Island with his friend Sam Sansalone, owner of Powell River Outdoors.

programme.desc: Lisa ventures to the breathtaking Wolf Lake in the Yukon, where the thrill of reeling in lake trout against a stunning wilderness backdrop makes for an unforgettable experience.

programme.desc: Mark Melnyk and Tom Rosenbauer are in Southern Chile fishing New Waters to them and the guides.

programme.desc: Josh targets winter springs at Harwood Island with his friend Sam Sansalone, owner of Powell River Outdoors.

programme.desc: It's 5-star treatment time from Northwest Ontario fishing remote lakes in summer for smallmouth bass from Hawk Lake Lodge.

programme.desc: This unique episode shows the ultimate north-country accommodations, combined with non-stop, drive-to fishing.

programme.desc: A father and son trip to Winter Harbour on Vancouver Island for Big King Salmon.

programme.title: BC Outdoors Sportfishing
programme.desc: Host Mike Mitchell and guests fish throughout British Columbia.

programme.title: Fishing the Wild West
programme.desc: The subtle bite of big walleye on Lac La Biche.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: The staff gets down to details that make a difference in the lure presentation process, offering overlooked tube rigging tricks for largemouth bass.

programme.title: The Next Bite
programme.desc: Korey Sprengel fishes the Mississippi River, in low water levels, for walleyes with a variety of techniques.

programme.title: Legends of Rod & Reel
programme.desc: Joe may not be the best angler, but fishing with him is unforgettable.

programme.title: Larry Smith Outdoors
programme.desc: Larry goes out on Lake Mendota with Noah Humfeld to troll walleyes.

programme.title: Jokers Wild off the Hook
programme.desc: Sparky Sparkes and his family travel to fish and have adventures in the U.S. and abroad.

programme.title: Angling Edge
programme.desc: James and Al Lindner break down a lake they have never fished, showing a repeatable process for locating walleyes anywhere.

programme.title: Jon Thelen's Destination Fish
programme.desc: Professional angler Jon Thelen takes you on fishing adventures revealing simple techniques to catch more fish across the Midwest and Canada.

programme.title: Bass Pro Shops Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: Fishing tips and tricks and competitive angling action.

programme.title: Fishing University
programme.desc: NFL Lineman Ben Cleveland is back, and we're catching fish in all phases of the spawn on Tennessee's Dale Hollow Lake.

programme.title: Ultimate Catch
programme.desc: Captain Eric and longtime friend Greg Watts go out for an epic day of light tackle inshore fishing on Florida's Space Coast.

programme.title: Texas Team Trail
programme.desc: Cabela's Texas Team Trail heads out for day 2 of the Championship at Sam Rayburn Reservoir; two boats are awarded, Champions crowned, and Team of the Year honor is presented.

programme.title: Power-Pole National Redfish Tour
programme.desc: The 2025 Power-Pole National Redfish Tour: Top 50 National Championship held at Sweetwater Marina in Delacroix, Louisiana - Part 3.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy is catching crappie in Bass in Alabama.

programme.title: Fishing With Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland and Mike work popping floats on the Gulf jetties for monster Bull Reds up to 40 pounds.

programme.title: Bill Dance Outdoors
programme.desc: Bill & Chris's catfishing adventure on the Tennessee continues in part 2.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Bill's tempting tributary tarpon in the Indian River Lagoon!

programme.title: The Fish Guyz
programme.desc: Captain Lain Goodwin, Earl Byrd, III, and an eclectic crew of local legends fish their way through the Florida Keys; professional Chef, Cat Pfeiffer, demystifies seafood with simple recipes made for the home kitchen.

programme.title: Big Coast
programme.desc: Travel North to Haida Gwaii to chase Albacore Tuna at 3rd Annual Haida Gwaii Tuna Poke!

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: JJ Eubanks walks us through his journey as a professional basketball player and how he's become the real MVP.

programme.title: Salt Water Sportsman National Seminar Series
programme.desc: George Poveromo and experts discuss tricks to improve a boat's performance and fish-ability.

programme.title: BigWater Adventures
programme.desc: Homer, Alaska True Cod plus a follow-up trip to Seward fad a fly-out for Salmon.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: The gang will be joined by Chad Poteat and his family today. Chad was diagnosed with ALS over a year ago, and he's always dreamed of being able to fish in the Florida Keys, and now that dream is becoming a reality.

programme.title: The Seahunter
programme.desc: Rob and Kaylee fish a tournament right in their backyard in hopes of winning back-to-back.

programme.title: Modern Fishing With Jared Jeffries
programme.desc: Last year Jared met Captain Rick Croson when he came out to explore the fishery of Wilmington, N.C.; the fishing is so good that Jared had to come back; this time Jared has planned to spend three days out on the water.

programme.title: MLF Team Series
programme.desc: Three teams compete in Florida for Knockout Match 1 of the Summit Cup to advance to the Championship.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Champion angler Chris Lane revisits waters that he fished decades ago, but can he pull a giant largemouth from the depths?

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: From United Supermarkets Arena in Lubbock, Texas.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: From Ed & Rae Schollmaier Arena in Fort Worth, Texas.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: No. 8 Houston visits No. 16 BYU Saturday at Marriott Center. Houston leads the series 11-6 and won the last meeting 74-54. The Battle of Cougars features two of the most statistically dominant programs in the Big 12 as conference play continues.

programme.title: 2026 Men's College World Series
programme.desc: The Troy Trojans and the West Virginia Mountaineers face-off in Omaha, Nebraska in the 2026 Men's College World Series. Troy's Jimmy Janicki leads his team with 19 home runs, while Gavin Kelly leads West Virginia with 17 home runs.

programme.title: 2026 Men's College World Series
programme.desc: The Ole Miss Rebels battle the North Carolina Tar Heels in a Men's College World Series game. Hunter Elliott, the strikeout leader for Ole Miss, faces North Carolina home run leader Cooper Nicholson in Omaha, Nebraska.

programme.title: College Track and Field
programme.desc: From Hayward Field in Eugene, Ore.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Narvaez welcomes the crew into his world, which revolves around Baseline Road, the Camino Real of Little Rock; he and his brother Raul Narvaez own four businesses in town, including El Super Pollo, a western wear store and two grocery stores.

programme.title: Cheerleading
programme.desc: Coverage of competitive cheerleading events.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: No. 8 Houston visits Utah at Jon M. Huntsman Center in Salt Lake City. The Cougars beat Utah 70-36 on Jan. 22, 2025. While Houston remains a national powerhouse, the Utes have struggled for consistency entering this high-stakes Big 12 matchup.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Civil War, America's South is looking to put the past behind it, and finds one path in a growing cultural passion of the North - football. In December 1932, the Southeastern Conference is officially formed.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: Multiple SEC schools claim national titles from the 1930s through the '50s, including LSU with star running back Billy Cannon in 1958, prior to Cannon's epic game-winning punt return against powerhouse Ole Miss a year later.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: In the 1960s, as Georgia Tech leaves the conference and the Civil Rights Movement becomes embedded in the history and image of the region, Bear Bryant, hired in 1958, becomes the face of Alabama - and SEC football.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: As a new decade dawns, quarterbacks Archie Manning, Bert Jones and Condredge Holloway build memorable legacies. Bear Bryant begins a new run of dominance at Alabama, and the rise of television sports transforms the SEC.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: The 1980s begin with Herschel Walker leading Georgia to a national title as a freshman. After Bear Bryant retires in 1982 and passes away four weeks later, control of the SEC is eventually transferred to Pat Dye and Bo Jackson at Auburn.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: The 1990s bring change, with expansion and the sport's first-ever conference championship game. Florida's Steve Spurrier fashions an era of high-octane offense, and his Gators form a rivalry with Tennessee and QB Peyton Manning.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: 2026 Men's College World Series
programme.desc: The Ole Miss Rebels battle the North Carolina Tar Heels in a Men's College World Series game. Hunter Elliott, the strikeout leader for Ole Miss, faces North Carolina home run leader Cooper Nicholson in Omaha, Nebraska.

programme.title: Live: Athletes Unlimited Softball League
programme.desc: From Smith Family Stadium in Durham, N.C.

programme.title: Live: NCAA Men's College World Series Studio
programme.desc: College baseball experts help viewers stay informed about NCAA Men's College World Series action.

programme.title: Live: 2026 Men's College World Series
programme.desc: The Oklahoma Sooners take on Alabama Crimson Tide in the Men's College World Series. Alabama punched its first ticket to the tournament since 1999 by beating St. John's, while Oklahoma swept Kansas in the Lawrence Super Regional to lock its spot.

programme.title: E60
programme.desc: The award-winning "E:60" features the best stories in sports. Hosted by Jeremy Schaap and Lisa Salters, this 60-minute ESPN original is a mix of all-access profiles with the biggest names, the most compelling stories from off the field of play, in-depth investigative reports and lighthearted tales, all presented with a cinematic sensibility.

programme.title: NBA Tip-Off
programme.desc: Host Ernie Johnson and analysts Shaquille O'Neal, Charles Barkley and Kenny Smith ready viewers for NBA action before ESPN's Wednesday night doubleheaders (and other select telecasts). Guest analysts also are featured from time to time.

programme.title: Live: 2026 Men's College World Series
programme.desc: The Texas Longhorns and Georgia Bulldogs meet in Game 4 of the Men's College World Series. The Bulldogs rely on Daniel Jackson and his .396 batting average, while the Longhorns look to Anthony Pack Jr. who leads the team with his .359 average.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Stories in New York sports from 1978.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: A look back at the year of 1979.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: Stories in New York sports from 1980.

programme.title: Broadway Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing action featuring up-and-coming fighters and promising contenders.

programme.title: Live: Mets Postgame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests review highlights from the previous New York Mets game, as well as giving extended commentary and in-depth insight to the team's overall performance.

programme.title: Live: SportsNite
programme.desc: SportsNite takes viewers inside all things New York sports by discussing the latest sports news of the night.

programme.title: Mets Classics

programme.title: Mets Hall of Fame: Class of 2026 Induction Ceremony
Live: Mets Pregame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests preview the upcoming New York Mets game and series, as well as recapping past performances.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The New York Mets meet the Atlanta Braves to continue their regular-season National League set. The Mets look to outfielder Juan Soto to anchor the top of the batting order, while the visiting Braves counter with Matt Olson who leads in home runs.

programme.title: Live: Mets Postgame
programme.desc: Analyst Gary Apple along with special guests review highlights from the previous New York Mets game, as well as giving extended commentary and in-depth insight to the team's overall performance.

programme.title: Oh Yeah ...
programme.desc: A look back at the obscure, oddball, and twisted stories in New York Sports from 1999.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The New York Mets meet the Atlanta Braves to continue their regular-season National League set. The Mets look to outfielder Juan Soto to anchor the top of the batting order, while the visiting Braves counter with Matt Olson who leads in home runs.
